title: Vanity Fair
subtitle: A glittering world that prices the soul cheaply
intro: After darkness, the fair arrives like relief: color, music, laughter, and a thousand stalls promising an easier self.
It sells honor without holiness, pleasure without peace, and a reputation polished enough to hide an unrepentant heart.
Refusal will make you strange here. Refuse anyway, and watch for the friend whose hope is born in the middle of the crowd.
spiritual_theme: Discernment, costly witness, and finding fellowship in a hostile fair
core_mechanic: Refuse the fair's wares, expose their false shine, meet Hopeful, and leave by the far gate without selling peace for applause.

design.provenance: Attachment Ch11 虚华市 + Ch12 忠信受审与殉道 (Skills 36-39). Faithful's trial/martyrdom folded in.

seven_beats.arrival: Faithful meets you at the gate; the fair blares with fame, wealth, comfort and power.
seven_beats.orientation: Gaudy stalls and a stage; a chapel half-hidden behind the market signage.
seven_beats.encounter: Merchants hawk glory; the mocking crowd jeers; you are called to public witness.
seven_beats.temptation: Buy the fair's wares — a badge of fame, a silver coin, a soft bed; and worldliness creeps in by the minute.
seven_beats.choice: 'We buy the truth' / stay silent to avoid trouble / make a compromise / let Faithful answer.
seven_beats.consequence: Bold witness lifts faith and resolve; compromise feeds deception and dulls watchfulness.
seven_beats.grace: Arrest with Faithful leads to his trial and martyrdom; Hopeful, stirred by the witness, joins you — grace succeeds grace.

chapel.verse_zh: 不要爱世界和世界上的事。
chapel.verse_en: Do not love the world or the things in the world.
chapel.hint_zh: 不是所有发光的，都来自真光。

primary_temptation.hook_zh: 买下名声吧，全城都会认识你。

trial.outcome: Faithful martyred; standing with him lets Hopeful join (companion succession).

design.stat_arc_note: Worldliness maps to deception; bold witness maps to perseverance/faith. Hopeful joins after the martyrdom.
